ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  This disclosure from Mitaram Ramlal Jangid, a promoter of Sumit Woods Limited, confirms that neither the promoter nor the promoter group created any new encumbrances on their equity shares during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. A key positive takeaway is that the detailed shareholding report explicitly shows zero shares currently encumbered by any listed promoter or promoter group entity, indicating strong financial stability and confidence from the core ownership. No red flags are identified in this document.
